title: i'm heading to cenote
description: Lyrics from i'm heading to cenote
body:
i'm heading to cenote with my laptop in back pack
everybody knows me cuz i go their every day
exaggeration is ok because we're not the things we said
and we are not the things we've done
and we are not things we thought we would become
my dumb conservatism
is that i mostly prefer livin
despite all its absurdism
yoked up to that status quo
i want all the smoke. for now
some day i won't. then to relax and stop trying
now i'm crying cuz dad's dying
and i'm fine when i'm by him
but when i'm not which is often
i already miss him like i never ever have before
can't see past it, but that's the door
and it looks just like i always imagine
when i practice unmasking
which part of this am i asking for
to be beyond seeing
not a void a noise that appears
when i'm solo i don't pick what i'm hearing
i'm here in the flesh
say that with my chest
belly laugh blessed
fresh dressed
do our best
put our service to the test
for every guess
make it up after for the rest
hope floats for everyone
you can put it on my tab
i just hope everyone remembers you still gotta drive the car you came in
and i don't know how far your going so all i can say is
